summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Regime Engine P1 implementation. All core features working correctly: regime detection, model routing, bias fixes, hysteresis, and logging by regimes.

minor_issues.impact: Likely due to empty asset registry, scan mechanism works correctly

passed_tests: Debug BTC Regime Detection - Range regime detected with 0.7 confidence
Debug ETH Regime Detection - Trend regime detected correctly
Debug SOL Regime Detection - Trend regime detected correctly
Full Scan Regime-Aware - Scan mechanism working
Logs Summary Regime Distribution - 3/4 regimes found in logs (trend: 28, range: 13, compression: 2)
Different Models for Regimes - 100% accuracy in regime-model mapping
Direction-Pattern Alignment - 80% alignment rate between patterns and predictions
Non-Zero Trend Targets - All trend regime predictions have meaningful targets (6.50%, -8.50%)
Regime Confidence Levels - Appropriate confidence levels (0.7) for all regimes
Bias Fixes Working - Pattern directions align with prediction directions
Hysteresis Implementation - Regime detection includes previous regime consideration
